wallpapers_dir.label: Wallpapers folder
wallpapers_dir.description: Root folder containing one subfolder per weather condition

check_minutes.label: Check interval (minutes)
check_minutes.description: How often to compare the wallpaper against the current weather

rotate_within_condition.label: Rotate within condition
rotate_within_condition.description: Pick a new wallpaper on every check, even if the weather has not changed
